title: Calculus Algebraic Shadow

solver_reuse.pressure: Exact polynomial replay computes the derivative of x^2 at x=3 as 6, while the malformed row claims the same derivative value is 5.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional calculus algebraic-shadow rows only when they add distinct exact-derivative, product-rule, tangent, convexity, or finite-polynomial solver pressure; keep differentiability from limits, MVT, integration, and FTC claims in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode derivative-rule identities as deterministic NRA polynomial equalities.
Replay tangent and critical-point witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation.
Keep the false derivative row tied to source-linked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence for the exact derivative-value contradiction.
Keep continuity, differentiability from limits, integration, and the fundamental theorem of calculus under Lean horizon until no-sorry Lean artifacts exist.
